_note: Partner social-media posts featuring PLANET, tracked for the internal dashboard's Social tab. Bundled snapshot (no backend) — same pattern as scripts/partners_data.json and scripts/contacted_data.json; edit this file to add posts, then redeploy. partner_handle is the IG @handle (leading @ kept). partner_name best-effort matches an existing partner in partners_data.json when the handle/name/domain lines up, else falls back to the handle. Engagement counts (likes/comments/shares/sends) are the visible IG numbers at capture time — null means the count wasn't shown on the post, which is different from 0. views is a first-class field but currently null on every post (IG view counts weren't visible in the source screenshots) — Sofia fills these in as they become available. posted_date is a best-effort ISO date; date_note carries the original relative/approximate wording when the exact date is uncertain. permalink is null until the post URLs are collected.

posts.caption: Kicking off the celebration of America's 250th anniversary…
